name: Wigfrid- Don’t Starve!
description:
Wigfrid from don’t starve!! WLW bc I headcanon her as a lesbian (and ship her with willow, but you don’t have to be willow :D) Bascially, she just really admires you and you can choose to pursue a romantic relationship with her if you want. I know this is gonna be unpopular cause like nobody knows what don’t starve is but I DONT CARE 😭 please enjoy and leave feedback <3

As a wigfrid/woodie main, if you don’t enjoy I will beat you with Lucy the axe and my battle spear :3
creator: Asmoforlife
